title: Lite Bite Foods is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Lite Bite Foods is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Lite Bite Foods is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lite Bite Foods:
Lite Bite Foods is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lite Bite Foods!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
